page: # F118 — Site-wide demo-mode audit. F115 established the LIVE/STATIC/QUAL badge + sourced-link pattern on colorado-deep-dive.html Key Metrics row. This CSV enumerates every remaining hardcoded KPI/stat and what each one needs (live wire / source badge / removal).
# Classification: LIVE = already wired to a data file; STATIC = real number but snapshot; QUAL = qualitative; FAKE = invented/no public basis (must replace or remove).
# action_taken filled in as each per-page commit lands.
